# Proof-Backed Upgrade Foundry v25

This public demonstration teaches the GoalOS upgrade law: a candidate artifact does not earn propagation because it is persuasive, useful-looking, or high-scoring. It earns a proof-backed upgrade right only after proof, evaluation, risk control, scope authorization, canary readiness, challenge-window clearance, rollback readiness, and human review.

## Public-safe posture

The page runs entirely in the browser. It has no account, no cookies, no analytics, no storage, no wallet connection, no network request, no token route, no transaction broadcast, and no production authority.

## Demonstrated objects

- GoalOSCommit
- RunCommitment
- ProofPacket
- EvalAttestation
- SelectionCertificate
- RolloutReceipt
- RollbackReceipt
- EvidenceDocket

## Outcomes

- UPGRADE_RIGHT_GRANTED_AFTER_HUMAN_REVIEW
- SELECTION_CERTIFICATE_HELD_FOR_REVIEW
- CANARY_ONLY_NEEDS_MORE_PROOF
- ROLLBACK_REQUIRED
- QUARANTINE_PRIVATE_APPENDIX
- REJECT_UPGRADE_RIGHT

## Teaching line

The product is the proof-backed upgrade right.
